race.comment: SRON NA CAISE (7) provided a very positive debut when around 7L back in fourth at Gowran Park (1900m) earlier this month. Standard improvement will see him in the mix. SPACEBOUND (6) finished runner up both outings including latest when 0.5L behind a Ballydoyle stablemate (1400m) having made most. Extra trip could see him in a good light. TREASURE ROSE (16) placed in four of seven starts as a juvenile. Third on the final occasion beaten 1.25L at Naas. Shown enough to suggest she can take a race of this nature. EL REHAIBY (2) races for a new yard after producing an improved second at Chelmsford (2000m) in October. Thereabouts.
